title: Director, Business Operations
jd_text:
We are seeking an experienced, high-impact Director, Business Operations to serve as a strategic partner to the General Manager (GM) for the Middle East region. This pivotal Director-level role is essential for ensuring the strategic vision is translated into coordinated execution and operational excellence across all regional functions. The successful candidate will be the primary link between strategy and operational delivery, acting as a trusted advisor, a pragmatic business operator, and a driving force for organizational efficiency.

This role requires a unique blend of strategic thinking, deep business and financial acumen, robust project management skills, and exceptional executive-level communication. The Director will be deeply immersed in the business, leading complex, cross-functional initiatives critical to accelerating growth and transformation in the Middle East market. With a proven track record of building strong relationships with leaders and stakeholders, you’ll combine commercial acumen with high emotional intelligence and an appreciable sense of humour to influence, challenge convention, and embed positive change. You’ll lead through collaboration and live our values of Collaboration, Trust, Impact, and Excellence in everything you do.

You Will

Strategic Planning, Execution & Performance Management

Directly translate the GM’s regional strategy into clear, measurable operational plans, Objectives and Key Results (OKRs), and reporting dashboards.

Act as a trusted advisor and confidant to the GM, offering objective perspective and data-driven guidance on regional opportunities, risks, and strategic priorities.

Act as the central point for monitoring regional performance. Design and maintain fit-for-purpose reporting dashboards to track key business metrics, financial data, and OKR progress, presenting concise, data-driven insights to the GM.

Conduct timely market, competitor, and economic analysis to inform decision-making and strategy adjustments specific to the Middle East business landscape.

Operational Excellence & Cross-Functional Leadership

Serve as a key partner to the GM, ensuring seamless execution of strategic initiatives and operational excellence across the region. This involves leading cross-functional coordination to drive alignment and productivity across all departments.

Oversee the efficiency and effectiveness of regional business procedures. Identify improvement opportunities, perform cost-benefit analyses, and champion the creation of streamlined and scalable end-to-end business processes.

Drive and lead key priority initiatives (e.g., major market expansion, specific transformation programs in KSA or other high-priority territories). The role is initiative-driven, not accounts-focused.

Oversee and manage a portfolio of critical, high-profile regional projects and workstreams. Design and directly manage complex programs to ensure timely delivery and alignment with strategic objectives.

Leadership Enablement & Communications

Build and maintain trusted relationships with functional and regional leaders across the organization to ensure high levels of awareness, adoption, and collaboration on the Middle East team's objectives.

Prepare concise and impactful internal and external communications, talking points, briefs, and presentations for the GM, including for employee town halls, executive leadership meetings, and external engagements.

You Have

12+ years of progressive experience in a strategic role (e.g., Business Operations, Strategy, Consulting), including 5+ years in leadership within a complex, multinational environment

Proven ability to translate regional strategy into clear operational plans, OKRs, and performance dashboards, ensuring rigorous execution and accountability.

Deep expertise in business operations, process redesign, and managing project portfolios, with a focus on driving efficiency and scalability.

Exceptional strategic and analytical acumen, capable of synthesizing complex data to advise the GM and drive evidence-based decisions.

Demonstrated strength in cross-functional coordination and influence, leading high-impact, initiative-driven programs (e.g., strategic projects in KSA or key markets).

High level of versatility and resilience, able to pivot seamlessly between high-level strategy and detailed operational challenges.

Fluency in English is essential, and Middle East market experience or Arabic proficiency is a strong advantage.

Our Benefits

Comprehensive Healthcare Plans

Paid Time Off

Retirement Plans

Comprehensive Medical, Dental and Vision Insurance Plans

Education Benefits

Paid Maternity and Paternity Leave

Family Care Benefits

Commuter Transit Program

Subscription Discounts

Employee Referral Program

Equal Opportunity Employer

All qualified applicants will receive consideration for employment without regard to race, color, religion, sex, age, national origin, protected veteran status, disability status or any other protected characteristic under applicable law.

Reasonable Accommodation

We are committed to providing reasonable accommodation for qualified individuals with disabilities in our job application and/or interview process. If you need assistance or accommodation in completing your application or participating in an interview due to a disability, email us at talentresourceteam@dowjones.com. Please put "Reasonable Accommodation" in the subject line and provide a brief description of the type of assistance you need. This inbox will not be monitored for application status updates.

Please refer to the privacy notice at the bottom of this page for submitting any data access, deletion, or other data subject rights requests, where permitted under your local laws and regulations.

Business Area: Dow Jones - Media Sales

Job Category: General Management

Union Status

Non-Union role

Since 1882, Dow Jones has been finding new ways to bring information to the world’s top business entities. Beginning as a niche news agency in an obscure Wall Street basement, Dow Jones has grown to be a worldwide news and information powerhouse, with prestigious brands including The Wall Street Journal, Dow Jones Newswires, Factiva, Barron’s, MarketWatch and Financial News.

This longevity and success is due to a relentless pursuit of accuracy, depth and innovation, enhanced by the wisdom of past experience and a solid grasp on the future ahead. More than its individual brands, Dow Jones is a modern gateway to intelligence, with innovative technology, advanced data feeds, integrated solutions, expert research, award-winning journalism and customizable apps and delivery systems to bring the information that matters most to customers, when and where they need it, every day.

Req ID: 50227
